# ecommerce-user-frontend Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-26

## Active Technologies
- TypeScript 4.9.x, React 18 + `@mui/material`, `@emotion/react`, `@emotion/styled`, `sass`, `tailwindcss`, `react-scripts` (001-create-base-theme)
- N/A (theme tokens are code/config artifacts) (001-create-base-theme)
- TypeScript 4.9.5, React 18.3.1 + Axios, Redux Toolkit, React Redux, React Router, MUI, Emotion, Sass, Tailwind CSS (002-cookie-auth-https)
- Browser-managed secure cookies for auth session; Redux state for in-memory auth status; no localStorage token persistence (002-cookie-auth-https)

- TypeScript 4.9.x, React 18 + React, React Router, Redux Toolkit, React Redux, MUI, Emotion, Axios, Sass, Tailwind CSS (master)
